(01) — Reading

Journal — notes
from the studio.

Slow writing on craft, process, tools, and the curious business of running a small studio. Two or three pieces a month, written by us.

⌘K

Featured — Craft

On the long-form / short-form rhythm of a brand system.

The brand system that survives is the one that knows when to whisper. A note on visual cadence, drawn from three years of identity work.

12 · APR · 2026 · 8 min read · By Sofie Lindquist

Tools

A field guide to specifying type for editorial websites.

A working set of CSS clamps, opsz tokens, and italics-on-purpose rules. Calibrated for Fraunces, but principles travel.

03 · MAR · 2026 · 6 min read

Process

Why we still draft every wireframe by hand, in 2026.

Figma is a precision tool, but a wireframe is a thinking tool. A defence of the A3 pad, the 0.5mm pencil, and the trash can.

18 · FEB · 2026 · 5 min read

Studio

How we price a brand identity, line by line.

An honest break-down of where the money goes when you commission a small studio for a full brand.

02 · FEB · 2026 · 4 min read

Industry

The case for smaller studios — three on purpose.

A reply to a question we get more than any other. On scale, on growth, and on quietly refusing both.

14 · JAN · 2026 · 9 min read

Craft

Page transitions as a design element, not a feature.

The transition is part of the design. A primer on shared-element morphs and where they pay off.

04 · JAN · 2026 · 7 min read

Studio Nord

A small studio building brands and digital experiences with discipline and quiet ambition.
